actions.value:
Our exchange partners have restrictions on serving users in certain areas. Since they use IP addresses to determine location, there's a lot of room for errors and internally we've noticed a lot of false positives. In particular, T-Mobile users are most affected because their IP always appears to come from Washington state, a Shapeshift restricted location.


We wrote an FAQ article on the topic with steps to try if you are getting this error incorrectly:


https://edgeapp.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/7097226446747-What-does-the-error-message-Location-restricted-Unable-to-complete-exchange-mean-
